title: Golden Age of the Old Republic
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=High Republic Era}}
{{Citation}}
{{Era
|image=
|name=Golden Age of the Old Republic
|years=[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]<ref name="rot">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>—[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="aotc">{{Film|II}}</ref>
|jurisdiction=[[The galaxy]]<ref name="rot" />
|prev=[[Inter-Sith Wars period]]<ref name="rot" />
|next=[[Great Peace of the Republic]]
|TYA=

{{Quote|This will be the beginning of a new era for the Republic. We will enter a new age of prosperity and peace.|Tarsus Valorum|<ref name="rot" />}}
The '''Golden Age of the Old Republic''', also known as the '''Great Reunification''', was the period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that began in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] which saw the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|rebirth]] of a [[Unification Policies|reformed]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after the [[New Sith Wars]] which entered into a new age of prosperity and peace with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] believed to be all but extinct by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus Valorum]] was seen as its chief architect.

==Description==
The Golden Age of the Old Republic, also known as the Great Reunification, was a period of time that began around [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] after the [[Republic Dark Age]] during when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] enjoyed long-last prosperity and peace as its decline was reversed,<ref name="rot" /> and the militarism<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> and wars that had plagued it for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] were finally over.<ref name="rot" />

The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] became more influential, forging a long-lasting peace. Adults were banned from entering, as they proved them to be too volatile and susceptible to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side's]] sway.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> With the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] presumed extinct, the Order were determined to completely eradicate all memory of them in under five decades to ensure they never returned.<ref name="TJP">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>

==History==
===Rebirth of the Republic===
{{Main|Ruusan Reformations/Legends}}
{{Quote|The Republic is crumbling. For the past thousand years it has slowly been decaying and rotting away. A rebirth is the only way to reverse this process.|Tarsus Valorum|<ref name="rot" />}}
[[File:Tarsus_Valorum-TEA.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Tarsus Valorum implemented the Ruusan Reformation and bought about the Golden Age of the Old Republic.]]
With the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|end]] of both the [[New Sith Wars]] and the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]], as highest ranking surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], used his authority to remove the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] from the position of galactic leadership they had acquired during the past centuries, and hand control back to civilian control. [[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus Valorum]] became the first non-Jedi to serve as [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] for six hundred years. Valorum came to power over a Republic in decline, to reverse this. Valorm reached out to the Jedi Order for support, believing that the backing of the Jedi High Council would show a commitment to peace. Valorum then passed the far-reaching reforms known as the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]],<ref name="rot" /> that restructured the Republic and ended the [[Republic Dark Age]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> One such reform allowed "[[Functional constituency|functional constituencies]]," which came to include entities such as corporations, to be granted a delegation in the Senate.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The [[Reformation Act]] was a critical piece of legislation passed during this period.<ref name="Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> With these reforms, the Golden Age of the Old Republic began.<ref name="rot" />

After the [[Unification Policies]] were enacted, the Galactic Senate was allowed to enforce the regulations in the Republic. Efforts to reunite the Republic however was seen as a form of bullying, as they wanted to keep their [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] out of the Republic. As a result, scattered separatist movements across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] rose up against the legal charges in the Republic. Sometime between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] and [[900 BBY/Legends|900 BBY]], the Galactic Republic conducted the [[Unification Campaigns]], in an effort to reunite the Republic.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|280|Unification Policies}}</ref>

===Unifying the galaxy===
{{Quote|To win a world, you must win the hearts and minds of its people.|Valorum to Johun Othone|<ref name="rot" />}}
Valorum's second term concluded in [[992 BBY]],<ref name="Date Note 2">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the ending of the [[New Sith Wars]], in which Tarsus Valorum was elected [[Supreme Chancellor]], to [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' states that he served eight years as Supreme Chancellor.</ref> and his [[Unidentified Supreme Chancellor (992 BBY)|successor]] pledged that she would continue the work that Valorum had started with the Ruusan Reformation and choosing to remain an advocate for the Republic and its values throughout the galaxy.<ref name="rot" />

===Legacy===
While the Ruusan Reformations repaired many of the declining aspects of the Republic, it fostered the very things it aimed to remove, the Senate found itself faced with gridlock and greed.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> ultimately paving the way to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|First Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Revenge of the Sith">{{Film|III}}</ref> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" />

==Timeline==
*[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]
**[[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]]
**End of the [[New Sith Wars]] and the [[Republic Dark Age]].
**The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] are believed to be extinct following the [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] campaign.
**[[Massacre on the Star-Wake]]
**[[Duel on Onderon]]
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] takes "Rain" as his apprentice, dubbing her [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]].
**Darth Bane, along with Darth Zannah, creates the [[Order of the Sith Lords]], thus continuing the legacy of the [[Sith Order]].
**[[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus Valorum]] is [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]].
**The [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]].
**[[Bodo Baas's Master]] predicts the birth of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].
**[[Gran Protectorate/Legends|Gran Protectorate]] is established on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].
**[[Hok/Legends|Hok]] is established as a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] colony.
**The first settlers arrive on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]].
**The [[Khommite/Legends|Khommites]] achieve a level of [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] technology far surpassing that of the rest of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].
**The [[Alsakan Tessent]] is carved to commemorate the [[Battle of the Ten Valleys]].
**[[Sapella]] enters an ice age. {{Circa}}
**''[[Baanu Miir]]'' is grown. {{Circa}}
**The [[Nuknog/Legends|Nuknog]] sell their homeworld [[Sump/Legends|Sump]] to a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] consortium
**[[Ore/Legends|Ore]] and [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] mining on [[Umnub]] plays out {{Circa}}<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

*[[998 BBY]]
**[[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]] begins learning [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith sorcery]] that was extracted from [[Freedon Nadd's holocron]] by [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]].<ref name="rot" />

*[[997 BBY/Legends|997 BBY]]
**The Jedi [[Sarro Xaj]], apprentice to [[Raskta Lsu]], advances in rank to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].

*[[996 BBY]]
**[[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]] constructs her personal [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]] and begins her training in [[Form III/Legends|Form III: Soresu]] combat.<ref name="rot" />

*[[995 BBY]]
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] makes his first attempt to create his own [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]], but fails. His second failed attempt may have been in this year or in 994 BBY.<ref name="rot" />

*[[992 BBY]]
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] makes his third failed attempt to create his own [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]].<ref name="rot" />

*[[990 BBY]]
**The Khommite believe they have reached the pinnacle of their civilization.
**[[Kidnap attempt on Serenno|Duel on Serenno]]
**[[Duel on Ambria (990 BBY)|Duel on Ambria]]
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] goes to [[Tython/Legends|Tython]] and finds the [[holocron of Belia Darzu]].
**Darth Bane and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]], [[Duel on Tython|duel]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]], [[Raskta Lsu]], [[Worror Dowmat|Worror]], [[Johun Othone]], and [[Sarro Xaj]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]].
**[[Duel on Tython]]
**Zannah arranges a [[Confrontation on Ambria|confrontation]] that results in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] belief that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] have been eliminated from [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
**[[Confrontation on Ambria]]

*[[987 BBY]]
**The [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] [[Salto Zendar]] is hunted down, [[Skirmish in the Bandomeer hospital|attacked]], and [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] in [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]].
**[[Skirmish in the Bandomeer hospital]]
**[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Lucia (soldier)|Lucia]] is nearly killed while attempting to capture Zendar, and is nursed back to health by [[Serra]].
**Lucia becomes Serra's bodyguard.

*[[980 BBY]]
**[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Gerran]] of [[Doan]] is [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]].
**[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Medd Tandar]], [[mining caste]] leader [[Gelba]], and five other miners are [[Massacre on Doan|assassinated]].
**[[Massacre on Doan]]
**[[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]] is [[Mission to Doan|sent]] to Doan to investigate Tandar's death.
**[[Mission to Doan]]
**[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] [[Mission to Prakith (Darth Bane)|finds]] the [[Holocron of Heresies|long lost holocron]] of [[Darth Andeddu]].
**[[Mission to Prakith (Darth Bane)|Mission to Prakith]]
**[[Set Harth]] [[Duel in Set Harth's mansion|battles]] Darth Zannah and becomes her new [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]].
**[[Duel in Set Harth's mansion]]
**[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Serra]] hires [[Darth Cognus|the Huntress]] to [[Skirmish in Darth Bane's mansion|capture]] Darth Bane.
**[[Skirmish in Darth Bane's mansion]]
**Set Harth steals Darth Andeddu's holocron and learns the power of [[transfer essence]].
**Darth Bane and Darth Zannah engage in their [[Duel on Doan|first duel]] on Doan.
**[[Duel on Doan]]
**Set Harth and the Huntress engage in a [[Skirmish in the Stone Prison hangar|brief skirmish]].
**[[Skirmish in the Stone Prison hangar]]
**The Huntress submits herself to Darth Bane's teachings, taking the title Darth Cognus.
**Darth Zannah defeats Darth Bane in a [[Duel on Ambria (980 BBY)|duel]], taking the title of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].
**[[Duel on Ambria (980 BBY)|Second Duel on Ambria]]
**Darth Cognus becomes Darth Zannah's apprentice.

*965 BBY
**[[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] passes the [[Defensive-only doctrine|Non-Aggression Law]].

*c. [[915 BBY]]
**[[Sise Fromm]] is born.

*[[896 BBY/Legends|896 BBY]]
**[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] is born on an unknown planet, and later begins his training with [[Hysalrian/Legends|Hysalrian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[N'Kata Del Gormo/Legends|N'Kata Del Gormo]] on an unknown swamp planet.

*c. [[800 BBY/Legends|800 BBY]]
**[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] begins to train [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

*[[796 BBY/Legends|796 BBY]]
**[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] is granted the title of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].

*[[700 BBY]]
**[[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Monks]] construct the monastery on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that will eventually become [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]].
**An [[Alderaan Biotics]] operation is established on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].

*c. [[620 BBY/Legends|620 BBY]]
**The [[Antarian Rangers/Legends|Antarian Rangers]] are established.

*[[610 BBY]]
**[[Dewlannamapia]] is born on Kashyyyk.

*[[600 BBY/Legends|600 BBY]]
**The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Allya/Legends|Allya]] is exiled to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].
**[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] is born on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide">''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]''</ref>

*c. [[592 BBY]]
**[[Gandle Ott]] is colonized by Humans.

*c. [[571 BBY]]
**The [[Clatear]] and the [[Nhoras]] begin a large-scale species-based feud.

*[[550 BBY]]
**The Bandit [[Alkhara/Legends|Alkhara]] moves into what will eventually become [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. His slaughter of a tribe of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand people]] begins the centuries-long Tusken/Human blood feud.
**The [[222 fishing trawler]] is designed and produced by Ubrikkian Transports.

*c. [[533 BBY]]
**[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Gravid]] is slain by his apprentice, [[Darth Gean]], during a [[Duel in Darth Gravid's bastion|duel]] on [[Jaguada/Legends|Jaguada]].<ref name="Gravid date">{{Blog|holocron|13/comments|Major Character Birth Years}} establishes that [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] was born 46 years before the events of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[46 BBY/Legends|46 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] (25: The Discreet Charm of the Meritocracy) states that Padmé Amidala "has only just turned thirteen" and that Gravid's reign "elapsed some five [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] earlier" which would place the quote regarding Gravid's death in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Thus, this article assumes that Gravid [[Death/Legends|died]] around [[533 BBY]].</ref>

*[[532 BBY/Legends|532 BBY]]
**Many [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] and [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] were taken as laborers to [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]].

*c. [[519 BBY/Legends|519 BBY]]
**The species later known as the [[Kallidahin/Legends|Polis Massans]] begin to investigate the remains of the [[Eellayin/Legends|Eellayin]] civilization on [[Polis Massa/Legends|Polis Massa]].

*[[516 BBY]]
**[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] forces the bandit [[Alkhara/Legends|Alkhara]] out of his palace.

*[[509 BBY/Legends|509 BBY]]
**[[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] is born.

*c. [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]]
**The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training vessel [[Chu'unthor]], is built in orbit around the planet [[Abhean/Legends|Abhean]] by [[Republic Fleet Systems]].
**The [[Daupherm-Boton Conflict]] begins.

*[[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]]
**The [[Federation of the Double Worlds]] is founded.
**[[Plagen]] is discovered.
**[[Tyvokka/Legends|Tyvokka]] is born on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

*[[496 BBY]]
**[[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]] was colonized by at least this time.

*[[491 BBY]]
**A civilization on [[Jandoon]] disappears.

*[[490 BBY]]
**The [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], a free-enterprise fiefdom of the galaxy, is founded to free the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and corporate moneymakers from each other.

*[[470 BBY]]
**[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] unsuccessfully attempts to withdraw from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], going so far as to utilize the ''[[Contemplanys Hermi]]'' clause for the first time in history.
**[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]] and [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] ally in a failed attempt to takeover the [[Federation of the Double Worlds]].

*[[439 BBY]]
**[[Spore]] is created by [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]].
**The [[Ithorian Spore crisis]] begins<ref name="HNN52">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52||Today in History}}</ref>

*[[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]
**The elitist Nomad's Retreat in the Nomad Mountains on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] expands its membership to become a public resort.
**[[Susevfi]] is settled by [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] expatriates.

*[[392 BBY/Legends|392 BBY]]
**[[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] is first settled by [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] refugees.

*[[380 BBY/Legends|380 BBY]]
**[[Keiran Halcyon]] defeats the [[Afarathu]] cult.

*378 BBY
**[[Ikrit]] discovers the [[Golden Globe]] within the [[Palace of the Woolamander]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

*[[350 BBY/Legends|350 BBY]]
**The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] is founded.
**The Great Cleansing occurs on [[Fyodos]], devastating the planet.
**[[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] is born on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

*[[340 BBY]]
**The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training vessel ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' crashes on the surface of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

*[[332 BBY/Legends|332 BBY]]
**The [[Sheyf]]s of [[Clan Vos]] begin to rule [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]].

*[[322 BBY/Legends|322 BBY]]
**The [[Annoo-dat]] conquer [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Gelefil]].

*[[321 BBY]]
**[[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] becomes a prison planet.

*319 BBY
**An embezzlement scandal results in twelve [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] executives being imprisoned on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]].

*[[312 BBY]]
**[[Berethron e Solo]] establishes a democratic constitutional monarchy on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], replacing the previous absolute monarchy.

==Appearances==
